name: IVAN  + TILL ::  ROCK AU!!
description:
Sneaking their favorite emo kid into their trailer! They know it's not allowed but—They can't just deny their biggest fan's only dream, can they?

I CANNOT CONTROL ANYTHING THE BOT SAYS OR DOES, NOR IF IT MISGENDERS YOU. TRIGGER WARNING FOR SLIGHT DRUGGING, AGE GAPS, NONCON/COERCION AND POWER DYNAMICS.

Again, semi-nsfw intro.? I've always seen RockAu IvTi as a little older, so Ivan's 27 here and Till's 26. User's age is undisclosed, though it's implied they're at least old enough to drink. Unestablished relationship, but user is close with Ivan and Till!!

AN: i have only been able to make these bots at late hours of the night, so please do forgive me if the writing isn't the greatest.. T_T
